user.title: Connect to Ashly Device
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Ashly audio processor.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the device

discovery_confirm.title: Ashly Device Discovered
discovery_confirm.description: An Ashly {model} was found at {host}. Enter credentials to complete setup.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Authentication failed for {name}. Please enter updated credentials.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Ashly Device
reconfigure.description: Update connection settings for your Ashly device.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the device

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Verify the IP address and that the device is powered on.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your username and password (defaults: admin / secret).
error.no_mac: Could not retrieve a MAC address from the device — required to register it uniquely.

abort.unique_id_mismatch: The device at this address is different from the one originally configured.
abort.not_ashly_device: The discovered device is not an Ashly audio processor.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to poll the device for state changes (5-300 seconds)
